zh.lifeSummary: 當Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon於1044年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon15歲，母親Joan verch Cadwgan25歲。他於1060年與Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr在威爾士結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1093年在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在威爾士卡迪甘史爾特雷加隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon于1044年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon15岁，母亲Joan verch Cadwgan25岁。他于1060年与Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr在威尔士结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1093年在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在威尔士卡迪甘史爾特雷加隆。

nameMeanings.name: Bleddyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from an ancient byname from blaidd ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -yn. Blaidd was often used in medieval Welsh as a term for a hero.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon was born in 1044, in Wales, his father, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, was 15 and his mother, Joan verch Cadwgan, was 25. He married Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr in 1060, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1093, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon est né en 1044, à Galles, son père, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Joan verch Cadwgan, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr en 1060, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1093, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon 1044 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon 15 und seine Mutter Joan verch Cadwgan 25. Er hat 1060 in Wales Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1093 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Wales begraben.

ht.Aberhonddu, Breconshire, Wales: Breconshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon è nato il nel 1044 nel Galles, il suo padre, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Joan verch Cadwgan, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr nel 1060, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1093, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Breconが1044年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Breconは15歳，母Joan verch Cadwganは25歳であった。1060年にウェールズでElen Ferch Tewdwr Mawrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1093年に故郷で49歳で死去し，ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアトレガーオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon(이)가 1044년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan verch Cadwgan(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1060년 웨일스에서 Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1093년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카디건실르 트레가에 묻혔다.

mg.Aberhonddu, Breconshire, Wales: Breconshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon nasceu em 1044, em Gales, seu pai, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Joan verch Cadwgan, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr em 1060, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1093, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon родился в 1044 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan verch Cadwgan, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr в 1060 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1093 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности трегарон, кардиганьшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon nació en 1044, en Gales, su papá, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Joan verch Cadwgan, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr en 1060, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1093, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Gales.
